title: Bosnia and Herzegovina (Republika Srpska) — Application for Classification of a Business Entity by Activity (Form RPS-1)
description: The Agency for Intermediary, IT and Financial Services' (Agencija za posredničke, informatičke i finansijske usluge, APIF) Form RPS-1, Пријава за разврставање пословног субјекта по дјелатности (Application for Classification of a Business Entity by Activity) — opens Bosnia and Herzegovina as the registry's 97th jurisdiction, via its Business Formation vertical (1 of 6). APIF administers the Register of Business Entities (Registar poslovnih subjekata, RPS) of Republika Srpska, one of Bosnia and Herzegovina's two constituent entities (the other being the Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina, plus the Brčko District); this schema is scoped to Republika Srpska only. Form RPS-1 is filed for several distinct events — establishment, merger, division, spin-off, joint venture, relocation-in (collectively, 'emergence' of a business entity), as well as, on the same form, a business entity's cessation or amendment of already-registered particulars — selected via a single 'type of change' field. This v1.0.0 is scoped to the six 'emergence' change types (the Business Formation use case: bringing a new business entity into the Register), following this registry's established narrow-scoping convention; cessation and pure-amendment filings are disclosed as out of scope, left as backlog for a future companion schema. APIF's own primary court-registration application (a companion, distinct form, 'Prijava za registraciju poslovnih subjekata u sudu') was found to be a dynamic XFA (Adobe LiveCycle) form not renderable by this registry's PDF-extraction toolchain; RPS-1 is a genuine, independently-filed statistical/registry classification application administered directly by APIF with a clean, extractable text layer, and is modelled here instead — see this document's own VERIFICATION.md for the full record of that finding. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Bosnia and Herzegovina, the Government of Republika Srpska, or APIF.

authority.name: Агенција за посредничке, информатичке и финансијске услуге (Agency for Intermediary, IT and Financial Services)

source.documentRef: Обр. РПС-1 — "Пријава за разврставање пословног субјекта по дјелатности" (Form RPS-1 — Application for Classification of a Business Entity by Activity)

verification.notes: GOV-4713 ("GovSchema Standard Research"). Opens Bosnia and Herzegovina as the registry's 97th jurisdiction. See this document's own VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record, extraction method, and every disclosed scoping/judgment call.

steps.title: II Подаци о сједишту и адреси (Seat and address data)
III Подаци из других регистара (Data from other registers)
V Подаци о пословном субјекту који води пословне књиге (Accounting-agent data)
VI.1.1 Настанак пословног субјекта (Emergence of the business entity)
Пријаву попунио / Датум (Application completed by / Date)

fields.name: businessNameFull
fields.label: 1.1 Пуни назив пословног субјекта (фирма)
fields.description: The business entity's full name (firm), in the form stated in its statute or as registered in the court or other special register.

fields.name: businessNameAbbreviated
fields.label: 1.2 Скраћени назив пословног субјекта (фирма)
fields.description: The business entity's abbreviated name, in the form entered in its statute or the court/special register, when one is registered. See this schema's own VERIFICATION.md Finding 1.

fields.name: organizationForm
fields.label: 2. Облик организовања
fields.description: The business entity's form of organization, transcribed from the form's own printed instruction sheet. See this schema's own VERIFICATION.md Finding 2 for the two enum values split from a single ambiguous source line.
fields.sourceRef: Section I, item 2; enumerated in the form's own "Извод из Упутства за попуњавање пријаве РПС-1" instruction sheet

fields.name: ownershipForm
fields.label: 3. Облик својине
fields.description: The business entity's form of ownership.
fields.sourceRef: Section I, item 3; enumerated in the form's own instruction sheet

fields.name: capitalOrigin
fields.label: 4. Поријекло капитала
fields.description: The origin of the business entity's capital.
fields.sourceRef: Section I, item 4; enumerated in the form's own instruction sheet

fields.name: territoryEstablishedFor
fields.label: 5. Пословни субјекат је основан за територију
fields.description: The territorial scope for which the business entity is established.
fields.sourceRef: Section I, item 5; enumerated in the form's own instruction sheet

fields.name: foreignTradeRegistered
fields.label: 6. Регистрован спољнотрговински промет
fields.description: Whether the business entity is registered in the court register for conducting foreign-trade transactions.

fields.name: postalCode
fields.label: 1. Поштански број
fields.description: Postal code of the business entity's registered seat.

fields.name: settlement
fields.label: Насеље
fields.description: Name of the settlement (town/village) of the business entity's registered seat. When the entity operates across multiple settlements, this is the settlement where its administration/management is located.

fields.name: street
fields.label: 2. Улица
fields.description: Street name of the business entity's registered seat.

fields.name: streetNumber
fields.label: Број
fields.description: Street/building number of the business entity's registered seat.

fields.name: municipalityOrCity
fields.label: 3. Општина/град
fields.description: Municipality or city of the business entity's registered seat.

fields.name: entityOrDistrict
fields.label: 4. Ентитет/дистрикт
fields.description: The constituent entity or district of Bosnia and Herzegovina (Republika Srpska, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina, or Brčko District) in which the business entity's registered seat lies. Modelled as free text: unlike Section I's items 2-5, the form's own instruction sheet gives no closed enumerated list of values for this item — see this schema's own VERIFICATION.md Finding 3.

fields.name: contactPhone
fields.label: 5. Телефон (тел/моб)
fields.description: Contact telephone or mobile number.

fields.name: fax
fields.label: 6. Телефакс
fields.description: Fax number, when the business entity has one.

fields.name: email
fields.label: 7. E-mail
fields.description: Email address of the business entity.

fields.name: directorFullName
fields.label: 8. Име и презиме директора/руководиоца
fields.description: Full name of the business entity's director/manager.

fields.name: directorPersonalOrEntityId
fields.label: 8.1 ЈМБГ/ЈИБ
fields.description: The director/manager's Unique Master Citizen Number (JMBG) when a natural person, or the managing entity's own unique identification number (JIB) when the director/manager is itself a legal entity.

fields.name: directorSex
fields.label: 8.2 Пол
fields.description: The director/manager's sex, when the director/manager is a natural person. Not applicable when the director/manager is itself a legal entity (see directorPersonalOrEntityId); the form provides no separate discriminator field, so this item is modelled as unconditionally optional rather than gated on a fabricated condition — see this schema's own VERIFICATION.md Finding 4.

fields.name: taxpayerId
fields.label: 1.1 ЈИБ пореског обвезника
fields.description: Unique identification number (JIB) assigned to the business entity by the Tax Administration, from another register. Optional: a business entity filing at first establishment may not yet hold a JIB from the Tax Administration.

fields.name: proposedActivity
fields.label: 2.1 Приједлог пословног субјекта (назив и шифра разреда дјелатности)
fields.description: The business entity's own proposed core activity (name and activity-class code under the Law on Classification of Activities), being the activity through which it expects to realize the greatest total revenue or employ the greatest number of workers.

fields.name: plannedNumberOfEmployees
fields.label: 3. Број запослених
fields.description: At establishment, the planned number of employees (as opposed to the actual month-end headcount entered for other filing types).

fields.name: accountingFirmTaxId
fields.label: 1. Јединствени идентификациони број фирме (ЈИБ)
fields.description: Unique identification number (JIB) of the business entity/firm responsible, on the business entity's behalf, for the accuracy of its business-book data — whether an in-house bookkeeper or a specialized external bookkeeping firm.

fields.name: accountingFirmRegistrationNumber
fields.label: 2. Матични број фирме
fields.description: Registration number (matični broj) of the accounting-responsible firm, when it already holds one. Optional: at first establishment with in-house (self-)accounting, the entity's own matični broj is not yet assigned by APIF at the time this application is filed — see this schema's own VERIFICATION.md Finding 5.

fields.name: accountingBooksAddress
fields.label: 3. Адреса и мјесто гдје се налазе пословне књиге
fields.description: Address and place where the business entity's business books are kept.

fields.name: accountingContactPhone
fields.label: 4. Тел/моб
fields.description: Contact telephone or mobile number for the accounting-responsible firm/bookkeeper.

fields.name: accountingBookkeeperName
fields.label: 5. Име и презиме овлашћеног књиговође
fields.description: Full name of the authorized bookkeeper, regardless of whether employed within the business entity itself or within a specialized bookkeeping firm.

fields.name: changeType
fields.label: 1.1 Настанак пословног субјекта
fields.description: Which of the six 'emergence' events this application reports: establishment, or creation via merger, division, spin-off, joint venture, or relocation-in. This schema is scoped to these six 'emergence' change types (the Business Formation use case); the form's own further cessation and pure-amendment change types (codes 21-29, 31-92) are out of scope — see this schema's own VERIFICATION.md Finding 6.

fields.name: predecessorEntityIds
fields.label: Матични/идентификациони бројеви пословног субјекта од којих је настанак извршен
fields.description: The registration number(s) (matični broj, from APIF's own Register of Business Entities) or, for a predecessor entity seated in the Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina or the Brčko District, the unique identification number(s) (JIB, from the corresponding register) of the business entity/entities from which this emergence was carried out. Required for every emergence type other than plain establishment.
fields.sourceRef: Section VI, note under item 1.1 — "За шифре 12 до 16 навести матичне/ идентификационе бројеве..."

fields.name: applicationCompletedByName
fields.label: Пријаву попунио (име и презиме)
fields.description: Full name of the person who completed this application.
fields.sourceRef: Closing declaration block — "Пријаву попунио ... (име и презиме)"

fields.name: applicationDate
fields.label: Датум
fields.description: Date this application was completed.

fields.name: applicantPersonalId
fields.label: ЈМБГ
fields.description: Unique Master Citizen Number (JMBG) of the person who completed this application.

fields.name: applicantIdOrPassportNumber
fields.label: Број ЛК/пасоша
fields.description: ID-card or passport number of the person who completed this application.

fields.name: applicantIdIssuedIn
fields.label: Издат/а у
fields.description: Place of issuance of the ID card or passport identified above.
